subject: PHYS
course_description: This course explores the intersection of physics and artificial intelligence. Covering statistical inference and neural networks as physical systems, students will learn how network architecture, optimization, and data properties drive emergent behaviors, all with a hands-on computational focus.
course_notes: (PHYS 212 or PHYS_OX 212) and (PHYS 220 or PHYS_OX 220) and PHYS 421, or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisites.
requisites: (PHYS 212 or PHYS_OX 212) and (PHYS 220 or PHYS_OX 220) and PHYS 421, or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisites.
